title: pteridium aquilinum var. glabrum
intro: Pteridium aquilinum var. glabrum, also known as the bristle fern, is a variant of the bracken fern, a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Dennstaedtiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pteridium aquilinum var. glabrum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water or using them in a decoction, and can be used as a tea or tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
